sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12657" key="a)poqumi/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποθῡμίᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n12657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rising of smoke</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vapour,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.647f</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπο-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
